bug_report.summary: Clicking/activating the “Footnotes-Unique” document changes its content (numeric ID changes unexpectedly)
steps_to_reproduce: With the document visible, click/activate the “Footnotes-Unique” tab/document (no edit command invoked).
Observe the numeric text in the document body (lower-right editor pane in the screenshot).
expected_behaviors: Activating/focusing a document/tab should not modify the document’s text/content.
actual_behaviors: The numeric identifier text in the document changes (e.g., last digits change from “…945” to “…741”) solely from clicking/activating the document (diff bboxes ~[1005,537]-[1044,562]).

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
